nasb.text: If a man actually lies with her so that her menstrual impurity is on him, he shall be unclean seven days, and every bed on which he lies shall be unclean.

esv.text: And if any man lies with her and her menstrual impurity comes upon him, he shall be unclean seven days, and every bed on which he lies shall be unclean.

cnv.text: 男人若是與那女人同睡，染上她的污穢，就不潔淨七天；他躺過的床都不潔淨。

ccb.text: 男人若与她同房，沾染了她的经血，就要不洁净七天，他躺过的床也不洁净。
